hero.description: As a Systems Engineer specializing in the critical bridge between backend and frontend, I am passionate about designing highly scalable SaaS architectures in Go and PostgreSQL, and automating complex workflows with AI.

experience.title: Experience & Education
experience.subtitle: A showcase of my professional journey, highlighting the roles and responsibilities that have shaped my skills as an engineer, and my academic background.

jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
jobs.subtitle: VIIO
description: Was part of the team that developed a scalable SaaS platform from scratch, championing clean code practices and the creation of highly reusable, optimized components.
Managed the crucial integration layer between backend data and frontend execution, streamlining API requests and state management to deliver ready-to-use data for UI developers.
Pioneered the integration of advanced AI workflows into the development cycle (utilizing Gemini 3 Pro, MCP context7, and NotebookLM) to automate repetitive tasks and accelerate process resolution.

Developed cross-platform mobile applications available on the Play Store and App Store, including the main VIIO app using Capacitor and Ionic, as well as an internal mobile tool leveraging React Native and Flutter.
Engineered backend solutions using Node.js and PostgreSQL, developing microservices and setting up testing environments.

jobs.title: Frontend Web Developer
jobs.subtitle: THE HUB
jobs.location: Bogota, D.C., Capital District, Colombia · Remote
description: Built and optimized high-impact interactive landing pages.
Engineered a complex Web3 avatar management system using Three.js, successfully rendering 3D character models and dynamically attaching digital assets fetched directly from the blockchain.

jobs.title: Internship Trainee
jobs.subtitle: ITRMachines (Intelligent Trading Machines)
jobs.location: Bogota, D.C., Capital District, Colombia · Hybrid
description: Completed a rigorous one-year internship focusing on frontend development and Web3 technologies.
Executed the controlled deployment of Solidity smart contracts, ensuring security and proper functionality.
Developed and improved critical user workflows and interfaces for a client-facing web application.

education.title: Engineer's degree, Computer Systems Engineering
education.subtitle: Universidad Nacional de Colombia
description: Completed a multidisciplinary curriculum combining core mathematics (Calculus, Linear Algebra, Probability & Statistics) with foundational Physics and Electronics (Mechanics, Electricity, Computer Architecture).

Mastered core computer science principles through rigorous coursework in Data Structures, Advanced Algorithms, Theory of Computation, Numerical Methods, and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP, Design Patterns, Clean Architecture).

Developed expertise in advanced specializations, including Parallel and Distributed Computing, Cryptography & Information Security, Mobile Application Development, Data Mining, Intelligent Systems, and Visual Computing.
Engineered resilient software architectures by applying theoretical knowledge to practical, interdisciplinary projects, leveraging industry-standard languages such as C++, C#, Python, and Go.
Acquired a holistic engineering perspective through courses in Systems Thinking, Project Management, Software Engineering (I, II, and Advanced), and IT Infrastructure Architecture.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.description: A selection of my most impactful work, spanning from decentralized Web3 applications and cross-platform FinTech wallets to highly resilient backend architectures.

items.title: VIIO App (Digital Wallet)
items.description: A comprehensive digital wallet available on iOS and Android for managing blockchain assets (USDC and USDT). Features include Visa card integration for real-world spending, deposits, withdrawals, and seamless transfers.

items.title: The Hub & 3D Avatar Module
items.description: Developed the landing page and the interactive 3D Avatar Module for The Hub DAO. Integrated Three.js to render 3D models and dynamically mapped blockchain assets directly onto the avatars.

items.title: VIIO Landing Page
items.description: Corporate landing page for the VIIO digital wallet, built for high performance, SEO optimization, and a seamless user acquisition funnel.

items.title: B12 API & CI/CD Challenge
items.description: Technical challenge showcasing API endpoint integrations and automated deployment pipelines using GitHub Actions (CI/CD).

items.title: Emergency Go System
items.description: A backend system built to handle emergency routing and processing, demonstrating strong backend logic and architecture outside of the standard frontend stack.

connect.title: Let's Connect
connect.description: I'm always open to discussing product design work or partnership opportunities.
